title: Judgment Circle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Judgment Circle''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] tradition where if one or more Jedi overstepped their bounds, other Jedi would convene and find a passable solution. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Justyn Ma'Ning]] convened one against fellow Jedi Master [[Jorus C'baoth]], due to his strict actions and placing the Jedi of ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' above the other crewmembers onboard.<ref name="Outbound Flight">[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}}
